oauth.accessDenied: Login was denied by the identity provider — most likely your domain admin hasn't approved Troop yet. Ask your admin or use a different email address.

card.title: Sign in to Troop
card.subtitle: Enter your email to manage your agents

hero.subtitle: Cron-scheduled, single-purpose, OpenApe-identity. Manage from anywhere.

index.tagline: "Hatched by you. Loyal to you. Lives on your computer."

error.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

empty.title: No agents registered yet.
empty.hint: Run {cmd} on a Mac to provision one. It'll show up here once it's done its first sync.

nest.offlineLabel: Nest offline — falling back to 5 min poll

systemPrompt.title: System prompt
systemPrompt.placeholder: You are … (personality, style, ground rules in 1–3 sentences)
systemPrompt.hint: Personality, style, ground rules — applies to every chat message and every task run. Synced to the agent host every ~5 min.

params.label: Params (JSON)
params.description: JSON object with the recipe params (see the recipe README for keys).

tools.title: Tools
tools.hint: Which tools may the agent use in chat? Default: all. Synced to the agent host every ~5 min after save — no bridge restart needed (every new chat thread reads the list fresh).

skills.title: Skills
skills.hint: Lazy-loaded SKILL.md instructions. The agent sees name + description in every system prompt; the body is read on demand via the file.read tool when the task matches.
skills.empty: No custom skills yet — the agent runs with the default skills bundled in {pkg} (one per built-in tool).
skills.confirmDelete: Delete skill '{name}'? This is permanent — to keep it but hide it from the agent use 'disabled'.

name.label: Name
name.descriptionNew: lowercase, [a-z0-9-], max 32 — becomes the directory name on disk

description.label: Description
description.description: One-liner the LLM sees in every system prompt; tells it when to load this skill
description.placeholder: When the user asks about IURIO projects, cases, or documents, load this.

body.label: Body (markdown)
body.description: Full SKILL.md content — workflows, commands, conventions

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Disabled skills stay on disk but the agent doesn't see them.

secrets.title: Secrets
secrets.hint: Capability values for this agent. The value is sealed to the agent's key before it's stored — Troop never keeps the plaintext and can't show it back. Set a value again to rotate it.
secrets.casingHint: UPPER_SNAKE_CASE. Binding works once the agent has synced after spawn.
secrets.confirmRevoke: Revoke '{env}'? The agent's copy is cleared on its next connect.

error.saveFailed: Save failed (the agent must have synced once after spawn)

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.empty: No tasks yet — tap "New task" to schedule the agent.
tasks.confirmDelete: Delete task "{name}"? Active launchd jobs on the agent host will be removed on the next sync.

userPrompt.label: What should run?
userPrompt.hint: The job for this run — agent's persona/style is set on the agent itself.
userPrompt.placeholder: Read my inbox and summarize the most important new mails.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.hint: Destroys the agent on the nest where it lives. The IdP record is removed, the bridge is stopped, the agent's home directory is wiped, and this Troop entry disappears.

destroy.title: Delete agent?
destroy.body: This destroys {name} on its nest (IdP record gone, bridge stopped, home wiped). The chat history stays intact, but the agent won't reply anymore.

pending.title: Destroying on the nest…
pending.hint: Approve the as=root grant on your iPhone if asked. This dialog closes when the nest reports back.

empty.title: No messages yet
empty.sub: Write to the agent below — the reply lands up here.

spawn.title: Spawn agent
spawn.subtitle: Name + prompt are the base. A recipe and secrets are optional, additive layers — expand them if you need them. You'll get a DDISA grant request on your iPhone — approve to complete.

alert.noNestDescription: Start the nest daemon on a Mac (apes nest install + run) and refresh.

host.label: Host
host.description: You have multiple Macs connected — pick the one to spawn on.

name.label: Name
name.description: lowercase, [a-z0-9-], max 24 chars — or pick from the list

preset.label: Preset
preset.description: Quick-start prompt. Tweak the textarea or pick 'Custom' for a blank slate.

systemPrompt.label: System prompt
systemPrompt.description: With a recipe this is added on top of the recipe's intent (user_addendum) — editable later without re-deploy.

custom.label: Custom (empty)
custom.description: Write your own system prompt or set it later on the agent's page.

calendar.label: 📅 Calendar assistant
calendar.description: Morning daily overview, alerts on schedule changes / conflicts.

mailTriage.label: 📬 Mail triage
mailTriage.description: Triages unread mail, prioritizes Action / Important / FYI / Spam.

timeTracker.label: ⏱ Time tracker
timeTracker.description: Parses activity logs, summarizes hours per project / company.

dailySummary.label: 🗞 Daily summary
dailySummary.description: Synthesizes activity logs + tasks + calendar into an end-of-day report.

field.label: Recipe
field.description: Pick a curated recipe, Custom for any pinned repo, or None.

params.label: Params
params.description: One KEY=value per line (recipe params, e.g. topic=AI agents).

blueskySummary.hint: Twice-daily digest of your Bluesky home timeline. Param: topic.

secrets.hint: Sealed to the agent before they're stored — Troop never keeps the plaintext. A chosen recipe pre-fills the names it needs; you can add more. Also editable later on the agent's page.

bridge.modelDescription: Required by the bridge at runtime.

pending.bindingHint: Sealing each value to the agent and pushing it.
pending.approvalHint: Approve the as=root grant in the OpenApe app on your phone. This dialog updates automatically.

result.missingSecrets: Spawned. Still missing secrets {names} — add them on the agent page.

cron.help: Subset: {any}, {fixed} (fixed), {step} (only on minute + hour). 5 fields: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week.

preview.noFireTimes: No fire times in the next 7 days
